scripts.generate:growth: node -e "import('./scripts/load-env.mjs').then(async ({ loadEnv }) => { await loadEnv(); const { generateDailyGrowthPack } = await import('./scripts/render-agents.mjs'); console.log(await generateDailyGrowthPack({ force: true, reason: 'cli' })); })"
